class.name: RenderSceneDataExtension
class.brief_description: This class allows for a RenderSceneData implementation to be made in GDExtension.
class.description: This class allows for a RenderSceneData implementation to be made in GDExtension.

method.name: _get_aspect
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the X:Y aspect ratio of camera projection used to render this frame.

method.name: _get_cam_projection
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the camera [Projection].

method.name: _get_cam_transform
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the camera [Transform3D].

method.name: _get_far_plane_half_extents
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the dimensions of the far clipping plane of the projection used to render this frame, divided by two.

method.name: _get_pixels_per_meter
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return [param for_pixel_width] divided by the viewport's width measured in meters on the near plane, after this view's projection is applied.

method.name: _get_transformed_projection_data
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the camera transformed projection data.

method.name: _get_uniform_buffer
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the [RID] of the uniform buffer containing the scene data as a UBO.

method.name: _get_view_count
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the view count.

method.name: _get_view_eye_offset
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the eye offset for the given [param view].

method.name: _get_view_projection
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the view [Projection] for the given [param view].

method.name: _get_viewport_half_extents
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the dimensions of the viewport plane used to render this frame, divided by two.

method.name: _get_z_far
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the distance beyond which positions are clipped, used to render this frame.

method.name: _get_z_near
method.description: Implement this in GDExtension to return the distance before which positions are clipped, used to render this frame.
